what_they_do: Multi-site facilities management company handling HVAC, cleaning, and security services for commercial properties across Riyadh.
likely_pain_points: Reactive maintenance costing more than planned
Manual work order tracking across sites
Difficulty demonstrating SLA compliance to clients
why_this_offer_fits: Multi-site FM operations with manual work order tracking is the primary use case for Maintenance Intelligence OS.
draft_angle: Open with the cost of reactive maintenance — unplanned callouts averaging 3x the cost of planned maintenance.
